revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: ''''妙見宮'''（みょうけんぐう）は各地に鎮座する[[神社]]。祭神は、[[天之御中主神]]、[[北極星]]。 * 読みが同じ神社 *...'
revision.text:
'''妙見宮'''（みょうけんぐう）は各地に鎮座する[[神社]]。祭神は、[[天之御中主神]]、[[北極星]]。
* 読みが同じ神社 ** [[妙見宮 (八代市)]] - [[熊本県]][[八代市]]鎮座
* 同じ読みの前に地名が付く神社 ** [[星田妙見宮]] - [[大阪府]][[交野市]]鎮座 ** [[葛城神社妙見宮]] - [[福岡県]][[築上郡]][[築上町]]鎮座 ** [[千葉妙見宮]] - [[千葉県]][[千葉市]][[中央区 (千葉市)|中央区]]鎮座
== 関連項目 == * [[妙見菩薩]] * [[星宮神社]]
{{aimai}} {{デフォルトソート:みようけんくう}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

revision.comment: 足立山妙見宮

{{aimai}} {{デフォルトソート:みようけんくう}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

* [[妙見神社 (東京都)]] - [[妙見島]]鎮座。 * [[千葉妙見宮]] - [[千葉県]][[千葉市]][[中央区 (千葉市)|中央区]]鎮座。 * [[星田妙見宮]] - [[大阪府]][[交野市]]鎮座。 * [[岩屋妙見宮]] - [[香川県]][[三豊市]][[仁尾町]]に鎮座。 * [[妙見神社 (鳴門市)]] - [[徳島県]][[鳴門市]][[撫養町林崎]]に鎮座。 * [[妙見宮 (東洋町)]] - [[高知県]][[安芸郡 (高知県)|安芸郡]][[東洋町]]白浜鎮座。 * [[妙見宮 (八代市)]] - [[熊本県]][[八代市]]鎮座。 * [[御祖神社|御祖神社（足立山妙見宮）]] - [[福岡県]][[北九州市]][[小倉北区]]鎮座…[[1945年]]に全国妙見総本宮と追称。 * [[直方市]]の[[多賀神社 (直方市)|多賀神社]]の旧称。 * [[葛城神社妙見宮]] - [[福岡県]][[築上郡]][[築上町]]鎮座。

revision.text:
'''妙見宮'''（みょうけんぐう）、'''妙見堂'''（みょうけんどう）、'''妙見神社'''（みょうけんじんじゃ）は各地に鎮座する[[神社]]。祭神は、[[天之御中主神]]、[[北極星]]。
* [[妙見神社 (東京都)]] - [[妙見島]]鎮座。 * [[千葉妙見宮]] - [[千葉県]][[千葉市]][[中央区 (千葉市)|中央区]]鎮座。 * [[星田妙見宮]] - [[大阪府]][[交野市]]鎮座。 * [[岩屋妙見宮]] - [[香川県]][[三豊市]][[仁尾町]]に鎮座。 * [[妙見神社 (鳴門市)]] - [[徳島県]][[鳴門市]][[撫養町林崎]]に鎮座。 * [[妙見宮 (東洋町)]] - [[高知県]][[安芸郡 (高知県)|安芸郡]][[東洋町]]白浜鎮座。 * [[妙見宮 (八代市)]] - [[熊本県]][[八代市]]鎮座。 * [[御祖神社|御祖神社（足立山妙見宮）]] - [[福岡県]][[北九州市]][[小倉北区]]鎮座…[[1945年]]に全国妙見総本宮と追称。 * [[直方市]]の[[多賀神社 (直方市)|多賀神社]]の旧称。 * [[葛城神社妙見宮]] - [[福岡県]][[築上郡]][[築上町]]鎮座。
== 関連項目 == * [[妙見菩薩]] * [[星宮神社]] * [[妙見山]] * [[妙見]] * [[相馬神社]] * [[天之御中主神]]
{{aimai}}
{{デフォルトソート:みようけんくう}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[妙見宮 (曖昧さ回避)]] to [[Myōken Shrine]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import
revision.text:
'''妙見宮'''（みょうけんぐう）、'''妙見堂'''（みょうけんどう）、'''妙見神社'''（みょうけんじんじゃ）は各地に鎮座する[[神社]]。祭神は、[[天之御中主神]]、[[北極星]]。
* [[妙見神社 (東京都)]] - [[妙見島]]鎮座。 * [[千葉妙見宮]] - [[千葉県]][[千葉市]][[中央区 (千葉市)|中央区]]鎮座。 * [[星田妙見宮]] - [[大阪府]][[交野市]]鎮座。 * [[岩屋妙見宮]] - [[香川県]][[三豊市]][[仁尾町]]に鎮座。 * [[妙見神社 (鳴門市)]] - [[徳島県]][[鳴門市]][[撫養町林崎]]に鎮座。 * [[妙見宮 (東洋町)]] - [[高知県]][[安芸郡 (高知県)|安芸郡]][[東洋町]]白浜鎮座。 * [[妙見宮 (八代市)]] - [[熊本県]][[八代市]]鎮座。 * [[御祖神社|御祖神社（足立山妙見宮）]] - [[福岡県]][[北九州市]][[小倉北区]]鎮座…[[1945年]]に全国妙見総本宮と追称。 * [[直方市]]の[[多賀神社 (直方市)|多賀神社]]の旧称。 * [[葛城神社妙見宮]] - [[福岡県]][[築上郡]][[築上町]]鎮座。
== 関連項目 == * [[妙見菩薩]] * [[星宮神社]] * [[妙見山]] * [[妙見]] * [[相馬神社]] * [[天之御中主神]]
{{aimai}}
{{デフォルトソート:みようけんくう}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:妙見宮 (曖昧さ回避)]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q16767999]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:22, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Myōken-gū''' (妙見宮), '''Myōkendō''' (妙見堂), or '''Myōken Shrine''' (妙見神社) are [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in various regions of Japan. The enshrined deities are [[Ame-no-Minakanushi]] and the [[:en:North Star|North Star]].
* {{ill|Myōken Shrine (Tokyo)|ja|妙見神社 (東京都)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōken Shrine (Tokyo)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located on [[Myōken Island]]. * {{ill|Chiba Shrine|ja|千葉妙見宮|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiba Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 千葉神社}} - Located in [[:en:Chūō-ku, Chiba|Chūō-ku, Chiba]], [[:en:Chiba Prefecture|Chiba Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Hoshida Myōkengū|ja|星田妙見宮|3=小松神社_(交野市)|1=Hoshida Myōkengū|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoshida Myōkengū|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoshida Myōkengū|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 小松神社 (交野市)}} - Located in [[:en:Katano|Katano]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Iwaya Myōken-gū|ja|岩屋妙見宮|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwaya Myōken-gū|qq=}} - Located in [[Nio-chō]], [[:en:Mitoyo|Mitoyo]], [[:en:Kagawa Prefecture|Kagawa Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Myōken Shrine (Naruto)|ja|妙見神社 (鳴門市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōken Shrine (Naruto)|qq=|1=Myōken Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65260227}} - Located in [[Muyachō Hayashizaki]], [[:en:Naruto|Naruto]], [[:en:Tokushima Prefecture|Tokushima Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Myōken-gū (Tōyō)|ja|妙見宮 (東洋町)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōken-gū (Tōyō)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Shirahama, [[:en:Tōyō|Tōyō]], [[:en:Aki District|Aki District]], [[:en:Kōchi Prefecture|Kōchi Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Myōken-gū (Yatsushiro)|ja|妙見宮 (八代市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōken-gū (Yatsushiro)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 八代神社|1=Yatsushiro Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11390558}} - Located in [[:en:Yatsushiro|Yatsushiro]], [[:en:Kumamoto Prefecture|Kumamoto Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Mioya Shrine (Adachiyama Myōken-gū)|ja|御祖神社|1=Adachi Myokengu|2=ja|3=御祖神社|4=fr|5=Adachi Myokengu|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Adachiyama Myokengu|1=Adachi Myokengu|4=fr|5=Adachi Myokengu|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Adachiyama Myokengu|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mioya Shrine (Adachiyama Myōken-gū)|13=User:Immanuelle/Adachi Myokengu|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Kokurakita-ku|Kokurakita-ku]], [[:en:Kitakyushu|Kitakyushu]], [[:en:Fukuoka Prefecture|Fukuoka Prefecture]]. Since [[:en:1945|1945]], also known as the General Myōken Shrine of Japan. * Former name of {{ill|Taga Shrine (Nogata)|ja|多賀神社 (直方市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taga Shrine (Nogata)|qq=|1=Taga Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11431094}} in [[:en:Nogata|Nogata]]. * {{ill|Katsuragi Shrine Myōken-gū|ja|葛城神社妙見宮|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katsuragi Shrine Myōken-gū|qq=|1=Katsuragi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11620917}} - Located in [[:en:Chikujō|Chikujō]], [[Chikujō District]], [[:en:Fukuoka Prefecture|Fukuoka Prefecture]].
== Related Pages == * [[:en:Myōken|Myōken Bosatsu]] * {{ill|Hoshimiya Shrine|ja|星宮神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoshimiya Shrine|qq=}} * [[:en:Mount Myōken|Mount Myōken]] * {{ill|Myōken|ja|妙見|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōken|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 妙見菩薩|1=Myōken|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10960623}} * {{ill|Sōma Shrine|ja|相馬神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōma Shrine|qq=|1=Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11582525}} * [[:en:Ame-no-Minakanushi|Ame-no-Minakanushi]]

'''Myōken-gū''' (妙見宮), '''Myōkendō''' (妙見堂), or '''Myōken Shrine''' (妙見神社) are {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine}} located in various regions of Japan. The enshrined deities are [[Ame-no-Minakanushi]] and the [[:en:North Star|North Star]].
* {{ill|Myōken Shrine (Tokyo)|ja|妙見神社 (東京都)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōken Shrine (Tokyo)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located on [[Myōken Island]]. * {{ill|Chiba Shrine|ja|千葉妙見宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiba Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 千葉神社}} - Located in {{ill|Chūō-ku, Chiba|en|Chūō-ku, Chiba|WD=Q1075869|lt=Chūō-ku, Chiba}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|en|Chiba Prefecture|WD=Q80011|lt=Chiba Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Hoshida Myōkengū|ja|星田妙見宮|3=小松神社_(交野市)|1=Hoshida Myōkengū|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoshida Myōkengū|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoshida Myōkengū|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 小松神社 (交野市)}} - Located in {{ill|Katano|en|Katano|WD=Q819646|lt=Katano}}, {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|en|Osaka Prefecture|WD=Q122723|lt=Osaka Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Iwaya Myōken-gū|ja|岩屋妙見宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwaya Myōken-gū|qq=}} - Located in [[Nio-chō]], {{ill|Mitoyo|en|Mitoyo|WD=Q16797271|lt=Mitoyo}}, {{ill|Kagawa Prefecture|en|Kagawa Prefecture|WD=Q161454|lt=Kagawa Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Myōken Shrine (Naruto)|ja|妙見神社 (鳴門市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōken Shrine (Naruto)|1=Myōken Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65260227}} - Located in [[Muyachō Hayashizaki]], {{ill|Naruto|en|Naruto|WD=Q26971382|lt=Naruto}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|en|Tokushima Prefecture|WD=Q160734|lt=Tokushima Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Myōken-gū (Tōyō)|ja|妙見宮 (東洋町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōken-gū (Tōyō)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Shirahama, [[:en:Tōyō|Tōyō]], [[:en:Aki District|Aki District]], {{ill|Kōchi Prefecture|en|Kōchi Prefecture|WD=Q134093|lt=Kōchi Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Myōken-gū (Yatsushiro)|ja|妙見宮 (八代市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōken-gū (Yatsushiro)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 八代神社|1=Yatsushiro Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11390558}} - Located in {{ill|Yatsushiro|en|Yatsushiro|WD=Q734479|lt=Yatsushiro}}, {{ill|Kumamoto Prefecture|en|Kumamoto Prefecture|WD=Q130308|lt=Kumamoto Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Mioya Shrine (Adachiyama Myōken-gū)|ja|御祖神社|1=Adachi Myokengu|2=ja|3=御祖神社|4=fr|5=Adachi Myokengu|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Adachiyama Myokengu|1=Adachi Myokengu|4=fr|5=Adachi Myokengu|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Adachiyama Myokengu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mioya Shrine (Adachiyama Myōken-gū)|13=User:Immanuelle/Adachi Myokengu|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Kokurakita-ku|Kokurakita-ku]], {{ill|Kitakyushu|en|Kitakyushu|WD=Q188806|lt=Kitakyushu}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|en|Fukuoka Prefecture|WD=Q123258|lt=Fukuoka Prefecture}}. Since {{ill|1945|en|1945|WD=Q5240|lt=1945}}, also known as the General Myōken Shrine of Japan. * Former name of {{ill|Taga Shrine (Nogata)|ja|多賀神社 (直方市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taga Shrine (Nogata)|1=Taga Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11431094}} in {{ill|Nogata|en|Nogata|WD=Q1995427|lt=Nogata}}. * {{ill|Katsuragi Shrine Myōken-gū|ja|葛城神社妙見宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katsuragi Shrine Myōken-gū|1=Katsuragi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11620917}} - Located in [[:en:Chikujō|Chikujō]], [[Chikujō District]], {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|en|Fukuoka Prefecture|WD=Q123258|lt=Fukuoka Prefecture}}.
== Related Pages == * {{ill|Myōken|en|Myōken|WD=Q10960623|lt=Myōken Bosatsu}} * {{ill|Hoshimiya Shrine|ja|星宮神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoshimiya Shrine|qq=}} * {{ill|Mount Myōken|en|Mount Myōken|WD=Q868348|lt=Mount Myōken}} * {{ill|Myōken|ja|妙見|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōken|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 妙見菩薩|1=Myōken|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10960623}} * {{ill|Sōma Shrine|ja|相馬神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōma Shrine|1=Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11582525}} * {{ill|Ame-no-Minakanushi|en|Ame-no-Minakanushi|WD=Q2842779|lt=Ame-no-Minakanushi}}

'''Myōken-gū''' (妙見宮), '''Myōkendō''' (妙見堂), or '''Myōken Shrine''' (妙見神社) are {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in various regions of Japan. The enshrined deities are [[Ame-no-Minakanushi]] and the [[:en:North Star|North Star]].

* {{ill|Myōken Shrine (Tokyo)|ja|妙見神社 (東京都)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōken Shrine (Tokyo)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located on [[Myōken Island]].

* {{ill|Iwaya Myōken-gū|ja|岩屋妙見宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwaya Myōken-gū|qq=}} - Located in [[Nio-chō]], {{ill|Mitoyo|en|Mitoyo|WD=Q16797271|lt=Mitoyo|1=Mitoyo}}, {{ill|Kagawa Prefecture|en|Kagawa Prefecture|WD=Q161454|lt=Kagawa Prefecture|1=Kagawa Prefecture}}.
* {{ill|Myōken Shrine (Naruto)|ja|妙見神社 (鳴門市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōken Shrine (Naruto)|1=Myōken Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65260227}} - Located in [[Muyachō Hayashizaki]], {{ill|Naruto|en|Naruto|WD=Q26971382|lt=Naruto|1=Naruto}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|en|Tokushima Prefecture|WD=Q160734|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}.
* {{ill|Myōken-gū (Tōyō)|ja|妙見宮 (東洋町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōken-gū (Tōyō)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Shirahama, [[:en:Tōyō|Tōyō]], [[:en:Aki District|Aki District]], {{ill|Kōchi Prefecture|en|Kōchi Prefecture|WD=Q134093|lt=Kōchi Prefecture|1=Kōchi Prefecture}}.
* {{ill|Myōken-gū (Yatsushiro)|ja|妙見宮 (八代市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōken-gū (Yatsushiro)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 八代神社|1=Yatsushiro Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11390558}} - Located in {{ill|Yatsushiro|en|Yatsushiro|WD=Q734479|lt=Yatsushiro|1=Yatsushiro}}, {{ill|Kumamoto Prefecture|en|Kumamoto Prefecture|WD=Q130308|lt=Kumamoto Prefecture|1=Kumamoto Prefecture}}.
* {{ill|Mioya Shrine (Adachiyama Myōken-gū)|ja|御祖神社|1=Adachi Myokengu|2=ja|3=御祖神社|4=fr|5=Adachi Myokengu|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Adachiyama Myokengu|1=Adachi Myokengu|4=fr|5=Adachi Myokengu|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Adachiyama Myokengu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mioya Shrine (Adachiyama Myōken-gū)|13=User:Immanuelle/Adachi Myokengu|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Kokurakita-ku|Kokurakita-ku]], {{ill|Kitakyushu|en|Kitakyushu|WD=Q188806|lt=Kitakyushu|1=Kitakyushu}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|en|Fukuoka Prefecture|WD=Q123258|lt=Fukuoka Prefecture|1=Fukuoka Prefecture}}. Since {{ill|1945|en|1945|WD=Q5240|lt=1945|1=1945}}, also known as the General Myōken Shrine of Japan.
* Former name of {{ill|Taga Shrine (Nogata)|ja|多賀神社 (直方市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taga Shrine (Nogata)|1=Taga Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11431094}} in {{ill|Nogata|en|Nogata|WD=Q1995427|lt=Nogata|1=Nogata}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:妙見宮 (曖昧さ回避)]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:妙見宮 (曖昧さ回避)]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:妙見宮 (曖昧さ回避)]]

'''Myōken-gū''' (妙見宮), '''Myōkendō''' (妙見堂), or '''Myōken Shrine''' (妙見神社) are {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in various regions of Japan. The enshrined deities are [[Ame-no-Minakanushi]] and the [[:en:North Star|North Star]].

* {{ill|Myōken Shrine (Tokyo)|ja|妙見神社 (東京都)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōken Shrine (Tokyo)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located on [[Myōken Island]].
* {{ill|Chiba Shrine|ja|千葉妙見宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiba Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 千葉神社}} - Located in {{ill|Chūō-ku, Chiba|en|Chūō-ku, Chiba|qid=Q1075869|lt=Chūō-ku, Chiba|1=Chūō-ku, Chiba}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|en|Chiba Prefecture|qid=Q80011|lt=Chiba Prefecture|1=Chiba Prefecture}}.
* {{ill|Hoshida Myōkengū|ja|星田妙見宮|3=小松神社_(交野市)|1=Hoshida Myōkengū|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoshida Myōkengū|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoshida Myōkengū|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 小松神社 (交野市)}} - Located in {{ill|Katano|en|Katano|qid=Q819646|lt=Katano|1=Katano}}, {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|en|Osaka Prefecture|qid=Q122723|lt=Osaka Prefecture|1=Osaka Prefecture}}.
* {{ill|Iwaya Myōken-gū|ja|岩屋妙見宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwaya Myōken-gū|qq=}} - Located in [[Nio-chō]], {{ill|Mitoyo|en|Mitoyo|qid=Q16797271|lt=Mitoyo|1=Mitoyo}}, {{ill|Kagawa Prefecture|en|Kagawa Prefecture|qid=Q161454|lt=Kagawa Prefecture|1=Kagawa Prefecture}}.
* {{ill|Myōken Shrine (Naruto)|ja|妙見神社 (鳴門市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōken Shrine (Naruto)|1=Myōken Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q65260227}} - Located in [[Muyachō Hayashizaki]], {{ill|Naruto|en|Naruto|qid=Q26971382|lt=Naruto|1=Naruto}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|en|Tokushima Prefecture|qid=Q160734|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}.
* {{ill|Myōken-gū (Tōyō)|ja|妙見宮 (東洋町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōken-gū (Tōyō)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Shirahama, [[:en:Tōyō|Tōyō]], [[:en:Aki District|Aki District]], {{ill|Kōchi Prefecture|en|Kōchi Prefecture|qid=Q134093|lt=Kōchi Prefecture|1=Kōchi Prefecture}}.
* {{ill|Myōken-gū (Yatsushiro)|ja|妙見宮 (八代市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōken-gū (Yatsushiro)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 八代神社|1=Yatsushiro Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11390558}} - Located in {{ill|Yatsushiro|en|Yatsushiro|qid=Q734479|lt=Yatsushiro|1=Yatsushiro}}, {{ill|Kumamoto Prefecture|en|Kumamoto Prefecture|qid=Q130308|lt=Kumamoto Prefecture|1=Kumamoto Prefecture}}.
* {{ill|Mioya Shrine (Adachiyama Myōken-gū)|ja|御祖神社|1=Adachi Myokengu|2=ja|3=御祖神社|4=fr|5=Adachi Myokengu|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Adachiyama Myokengu|1=Adachi Myokengu|4=fr|5=Adachi Myokengu|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Adachiyama Myokengu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mioya Shrine (Adachiyama Myōken-gū)|13=User:Immanuelle/Adachi Myokengu|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Kokurakita-ku|Kokurakita-ku]], {{ill|Kitakyushu|en|Kitakyushu|qid=Q188806|lt=Kitakyushu|1=Kitakyushu}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|en|Fukuoka Prefecture|qid=Q123258|lt=Fukuoka Prefecture|1=Fukuoka Prefecture}}. Since {{ill|1945|en|1945|qid=Q5240|lt=1945|1=1945}}, also known as the General Myōken Shrine of Japan.
* Former name of {{ill|Taga Shrine (Nogata)|ja|多賀神社 (直方市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taga Shrine (Nogata)|1=Taga Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11431094}} in {{ill|Nogata|en|Nogata|qid=Q1995427|lt=Nogata|1=Nogata}}.
* {{ill|Katsuragi Shrine Myōken-gū|ja|葛城神社妙見宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katsuragi Shrine Myōken-gū|1=Katsuragi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11620917}} - Located in [[:en:Chikujō|Chikujō]], [[Chikujō District]], {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|en|Fukuoka Prefecture|qid=Q123258|lt=Fukuoka Prefecture|1=Fukuoka Prefecture}}.
